line_items.validation_note: Turnover 340,931 less cost of sales 69,600 gives 271,331, but stated gross profit is 272,331, a discrepancy of 1,000. Stated gross profit reconciles with both the operating loss (272,331 less 677,908 equals the stated 405,577) and the stated 79.8% margin, so cost of sales appears misstated and should be 68,600. Value extracted as printed.

line_items.label: Retained Earnings
line_items.source_location: Consolidated Balance Sheet, Capital and Reserves, as at 31-Dec-25
line_items.validation_note: Retained earnings move from -865,681 at 30 June 2025 (per DOC-01) to +236,081, a positive swing of 1,101,762, despite a loss for the period of 485,144. Share premium falls 849,963 to 300,000 and share capital rises 144 to 25,000 over the same interval. Pattern is consistent with a capital reorganisation on re-registration as a PLC, but no note in this document explains it. Value extracted as printed.

extraction_notes: Six subtotal lines carry a discrepancy of exactly 1 against their components: current assets both periods, net current assets HY2025, total assets less current liabilities HY2026, net assets HY2026, equity HY2025, and closing cash HY2026. All are consistent with the statements being rounded to whole euro from underlying figures held in cents. Individually immaterial, but the pattern is systematic and is recorded rather than absorbed.
The HY2025 cost of sales discrepancy of 1,000 is a different class of error to the rounding artifacts above and is flagged separately with a proposed correct value.
Several balance sheet and cash flow subtotals are unlabelled in the source. Labels were assigned during extraction and this is noted per item. Confidence reduced to 0.95 for those rows.
Issue of new shares in the cash flow is 1,138,683 against narrative statements of 1.1m gross proceeds elsewhere in the document. The 38,683 difference is unexplained. Both figures extracted.
No segmentation data appears in this document. Channel, geography and product splits are FY2025 only and come from DOC-01 and DOC-03.
Note 4 goodwill of 669,500 conflicts with the balance sheet 669,550. Balance sheet figure used as it reconciles with the fixed assets subtotal.

The 21 enterprise customers referenced relates to deals closed in the period, which is a different measure from customers served. Not extracted as a customer count to avoid conflation with the FY2025 count of 36 enterprise customers.
Depreciation is the only non-cash adjustment disclosed. No amortisation appears despite development costs of 239,765 on the balance sheet, which may indicate amortisation begins in a later period.
Contingent consideration of 850,000 has no HY2025 comparative, correctly, as the Loamin acquisition completed 14 November 2025.
